report.title: Quarterly Widget Performance
report.summary: Widget shipments rose 8.4% quarter-over-quarter, driven by sustained demand for the WGT-220 line and the long-awaited recovery in EMEA distribution. Margin compressed by 60bps as input costs continued to track above plan, partially offset by improved freight rates from the renegotiated 3PL contract.

lines.notes: new SKU; channel sell-in still underway

report.outlook: Q3 forecast holds at 138k units assuming the WGT-220 line debottleneck completes on schedule. Sensitivity to input-cost movement remains the dominant variable; a 5% swing in resin pricing maps to roughly 35bps of gross margin.
action_items: Engineering to close out WGT-220 line-2 commissioning by week 8.
Sourcing to lock in resin contracts for H2.
Channel team to investigate WGT-440 returns and report at the next ops review.
